title: Sappy's Ridiculous Modpack
body:
# Overview

A vanilla friendly modpack that enhances Minecraft without losing the vanilla feel. It's as if you are playing a whole new game

## Why Ridiculous then?

Because it's so ridiculously easy to transform this game into something totally new and enhanced without losing any part of the vanilla minecraft

## Features

1. New terrain generation
2. New structures
3. New biomes
4. New villages
5. New UI animations
6. New entity animations
7. Sound overhaul
8. End Overhaul
9. Vanilla friendly
10. Internet World Host Support

## Benchmarks (Without Shaders)
- Potato hardware (i3-6006U, 8gb 2133MHz DDR4, 128GB SSD, Render and Simulation distance - 8 chunks, Fast Settings )  ≈ 60 FPS
- Mid-Range hardware (Ryzen 7 5800H, RTX 3060 Mobile 6GB (100W), 16GB 3200MHz DDR4, 1TB SSD, Render and Simulation distance - 12 chunks, Fast Settings ) ≈ 1200fps
